notes: Camera animation now works WITH the camera tool (user request 2026-06). The カメラ tool and カメラアニメ panel used to close each other (mutual exclusion via closeAllPanels). They now COEXIST — like the 日照 panel — so you can frame each shot with the camera tool (sensor / focal / FOV) and then add a path key that CAPTURES that framing: each key already stores pos + yaw/pitch/roll + fov + focal + aspect + sensor + margin, and playback interpolates & applies the FOV, so the fly-through zooms/frames exactly as you set each point. Keep moving + reframing + adding keys to build the path. The anim panel auto-tucks to the left of the camera panel so they don't overlap. Verified: both stay active together, no overlap, a key added with the tool open captured focal 35 / fov 32 / aspect 16:9 / sensor ff. Builds on v0.0.24.
